title: NEXUS Output Receipt (NOR) v0.3
description: Cryptographic audit receipt for every NEXUS agent action. Provides non-repudiable, chain-of-custody evidence compatible with OpenTelemetry and OCSF SIEM integration. Defined in NEXUS-A2A Specification v0.3 Part III.

receipt_id.description: Globally unique receipt identifier (UUID v4). Immutable after issuance.

agent_did.description: DID of the agent that executed this action. Bound to AIM at registration.

action_type.description: Semantic category of the action. Drives OCSF event class assignment.

tool_name.description: Name of the tool, function, or resource accessed.

tool_arguments_hash.description: SHA-256 of the serialized tool arguments. Enables tamper detection without exposing argument values.

outcome.description: Guardian verdict applied to this action. deny always maps to OCSF POLICY_VIOLATION (6002).

guardian_policy_id.description: Identifier of the policy rule that produced the outcome. Omit on allow with no policy rule triggered.

deny_reason.description: Human-readable explanation for deny or modify outcomes. Required when outcome != allow.

delegation_depth.description: Depth in the delegation graph at which this action was executed. 0 = root agent.

cael_envelope_hash.description: SHA-256 of the CAEL envelope that authorized this action. Enables end-to-end correlation across delegation hops.

reasoning_chain_hash.description: SHA-256 of the agent reasoning chain submitted with the Guardian step context. Supports OWASP ASI10 (Rogue Agent) forensics.

timestamp_utc.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which the Guardian verdict was recorded.

receipt_hash.description: SHA-256 of the canonical JSON of all other NOR fields. Signs the receipt content.

signature.description: Ed25519 signature over receipt_hash, using agent's AIM signing key. Base64url encoded.

ocsf_class_uid.description: OCSF event class UID. 6002=POLICY_VIOLATION (any deny), 6003=API_ACTIVITY (allow tool_call), 6004=DATA_ACTIVITY (memory ops). Set by nor_to_otel_attributes().

examples.deny_reason: I-2 VIOLATED: path traversal detected in file_path argument
